proactive_activities: Annual literature search; PMCF registry study (ongoing); state-of-the-art review; EUDAMED/MAUDE database monitoring quarterly
reactive_activities: Complaint handling per SOP-QMS-015; vigilance reporting per SOP-REG-008; FSCA management per SOP-REG-012; trend analysis monthly
trend_reporting_thresholds: Complaint rate > 0.02 per 1000 units triggers trend review; serious incident rate > 0.005 per 1000 units triggers immediate investigation
complaint_handling_summary: All complaints investigated within 30 days; serious complaints within 5 working days. MDR assessment performed for all serious events.
pmcf_activities: SURGIFLOW-REGISTRY-001: Multi-centre observational registry study; annual literature search; comparison with similar devices
